CORRECT.model_response:
The largest atoll in the world by land area is the Great Barrier Reef, but it is not an atoll. The largest atoll by land area is the atoll of Funafuti, part of the Tuamotu Archipelago in French Polynesia. However, if considering the entire reef system, the Great Barrier Reef is the largest coral reef system, but not an atoll.
